name: Red-Plum Spice Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup red plums, drained (chop plums into quarters; reserve liquid)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and dry ingredients together.
2. Cream shortening with sugar; add eggs and beat thoroughly.
3. Add dry ingredients and beat well.
4. Fold in plums, plum liquid, and nuts.
5. Pour into cake pan approximately 7x11-inches.
6. Bake at 375 degrees for about 35 minutes.
Cream Cheese Frosting:
1. Beat 3 ounces cream cheese, softened.
2. Add 2 teaspoons plum liquid and 1-1/2 cups powdered sugar.
